headline: Did J.B. Hunt’s (JBHT) Sustainability Index Win Just Shift Its Low-Carbon Logistics Investment Narrative?
summary: Earlier this week, J.B. Hunt Transport Services was added to the Dow Jones Best-in-Class North America Index following S&P Global’s 2025 Corporate Sustainability Assessment, recognizing its efforts to cut carbon emissions and expand rail-based freight solutions. As the only trucking company among the four ground transportation names in the index, J.B. Hunt’s sustainability profile may increasingly influence how investors compare it with peers in low-carbon logistics. We’ll now examine how...
